status.linked: Akawunti ya ku OSI Server eyungibbwa

warning.title: Kigambiddwa
warning.message: Oluvannyuma lw'okuyunga, oteekwa okukozesa ebintu by'okuyingira ebya OSI Server okuyingira. OSI OS etereka ekikakasa ekitali kuyintaneeti ekya Gateway eno, olw'okuyingira okuyungiddwa.

success.title: Kiyungibwa bulungi
success.message: Akawunti yo kati eyungiddwa nga {{username}} ku OSI Server.

unlink.confirm: Oli mukakafu? Oluvannyuma lw'okugyamu, oteekwa okozesa ekigambo kyo ky'okulinda eky'omu bitundu ekya mazima.

errors.networkError: Teyinziddwa kutuuka ku OSI Server. Kebera endabirwamu n'okuteekateeka kwo kw'omukutu.
errors.authFailed: Ebintu by'okuyingira by'OSI Server si bya mazima.
errors.forceSyncFailed: Okusinkroniza ku mukono kugaanye. Gezaako nate.

sync.title: Okusinkroniza ku mukono
sync.description: Kola okusinkroniza kw'okuddaabiriza kaakano ne OSI Server.
sync.refreshed: Token y'okusinkroniza ezze obuggya nga tonnasinkroniza.
sync.pending: Ebiragiro ebirindiridde ebifunibbwa: {{fetched}}, ebiterekeddwa okukozesebwa mu kitundu: {{queued}}
sync.pendingAfterResponse: Okukozesa mu kitundu kugenda mu maaso oluvannyuma lw'okuddamu kuno.

reauth.title: Token y'okusinkroniza ewedde ekiseera
reauth.description: Yingira nate ku OSI Server okufuna token empya ey'okusinkroniza eya Gateway eno.
